# A-Interiors

> Premium interior design, finishing and renovation specialists in Zimbabwe — kitchens, ceilings, painting, flooring, window treatments and full commercial fit-outs.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, ethos, featured projects and contact info.
- [Projects](/projects): Full portfolio of residential, commercial and clinical interior work.

- [Project: Custom Grey Kitchen Build](/projects/kitchen-build-grey)
